config.title: ChainlessChain IDE Bridge
config.ide.enabled.description: Run the IDE bridge MCP server so `cc agent` can auto-connect.
config.cli.path.description: Path to the ChainlessChain CLI executable the chat panel spawns (default: `cc` from PATH; install with `npm i -g chainlesschain`).
config.chat.provider.description: LLM provider for the chat panel (e.g. ollama, anthropic, volcengine). Empty = the CLI's configured default.
config.chat.model.description: Model for the chat panel (e.g. qwen2.5:7b). Empty = the CLI's configured default.
config.chat.contextIndicator.description: Show a persistent context-window usage line (tokens used / window) under the chat, refreshed after each turn.
config.codeLens.enabled.description: Show ✨ Explain / Refactor CodeLens above functions, methods and classes (uses the language's own symbol provider).
cmd.complete.trigger.title: ChainlessChain: Trigger Inline Completion
config.completion.enabled.description: Enable inline ghost-text completion via `cc complete`. Manual-trigger only (bind or use the Trigger Inline Completion command, default Alt+\) — typing never calls the model.
